DECLARATION OF OF ANTHONY C. DEICHLER IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS FROM PLNTFS' AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT KIM, KEUM OK

DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS AN ABUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO SERVE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF 286.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. (610/BCHAN)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS
